date_end_of_support.desc: Unix timestamp of the date of past or upcoming end of support cycles. If not provided will include all announced end of support cycles. 0

date_sessions_started.desc: Unix timestamp of a date to start looking for user sessions. If not provided will start six months ago. 0

desc: Ask Slackbot to send you an export listing all workspace members using unsupported software, presented as a zipped CSV file.

errors.could_not_export: For some reason, the export could not be started
errors.invalid_team_id: The team ID passed is invalid
